Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Demanded In Deposition Notice And To Compel Testimony Regarding The Documents;
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents at deposition is granted in part and denied in part. Defendant is ordered to produce documents responsive to request on or before January 18, 2006. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to the necessity of resuming the deposition of defendant for the limited purpose of questioning related to said documents. The motion is denied as to request #10. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
